videos.title: China prepares for biggest snow festival with giant ice castles, snow sculptures
videos.description:
Visitors were enjoying Harbin’s Ice and Snow World, in China’s Heilongjiang province, on Sunday, ahead of an official opening ceremony on Monday night, the 27th edition and the largest yet of the annual Ice and Snow World.

This year’s theme is “A Fairy Tale World,” and workers were putting the final touches on ice castles, giant steam trains, slides and snow sculptures.

Meanwhile, visitors took pictures and admired the nearly finished giant ice structures, snow and frozen flowers.

The ice show, which includes ice slides and a nighttime light show, will continue until mid-February, weather permitting, according to the festival’s website.

videos.title: Thousands gather for outdoor speed skating marathon, the Elfstedentocht
videos.description:
The Elfstedentocht is a 125-mile race across 11 Dutch cities over frozen water, but it hasn't actually been held in the Netherlands since 1997. See the full report, here: https://cbsn.ws/2TwZcpp
